title: Selecting a workspace template via automation
excerpt: Is there a way to use the automation “When an item is created” - “Then create a board from template” and select a work space template?

posts.author: jon1 (Jonathan Hurr)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to use the automation “When an item is created” - “Then create a board from template” and select a work space template?

posts.author: afernandezredk (Antonio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jon1 you can use this recipe, and when select the template board, you can expand the advanced configuration and put your new board in the workspace you want.

image667×729 73.1 KB

But if you need to create multiples boards (like a set of boards in a workspace) you can add multiple times the same action:

image918×394 21.3 KB

posts.author: jon1 (Jonathan Hurr)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank You for your response.
I created a template by using a designated workspace when selected will create a folder with multiple boards in it (an app essentially.) I would like to use an automation to select that template, but that template doesn’t appear as an option to select.
Do you know if there is a way to use that app/template?
